THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAYNE, TIMOTHY $1,334.11 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,424.11, COURT FINDS THAT (1) PLAINTIFF IS THE PROPER PARTY AS SUCCESSOE-IN-INTEREST TO BAYCHESTER SHOPPIMG CENTER WEST, INC. (CIV.C821); (2) DEFENDANT TIMOTHY WAYNE SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1334.11 REPRESENTING THE AMOUNTS OWED FOR THE MONTHS OF MAY AND JUNE, 2004; (3) THE REMAINDER OF THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STAUTE OF LIMITATIONS; (4) THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRYAN ANDREWS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
